header: Number of genes with known resistance to target antibiotics

data.tool: Annotation with Staramr v0.10.0 with ResFinder database (last update 2022-May-24) [90% identity and 60% coverage cutoffs]
data.title: Acquired resistance genes
values: Amoxicillin, Amoxicillin+Clavulanic acid, Ampicillin, Ampicillin+Clavulanic acid, Cefepime, Cefixime, Cefotaxime, Cefoxitin, Ceftazidime, Ertapenem, Imipenem, Meropenem, Piperacillin, Piperacillin+Tazobactam
Benzylkonium Chloride, Cetylpyridinium Chloride, Chlorhexidine, Ethidium Bromide
